title: bidens linearifolia
intro: Bidens linearifolia, also known as the cut-leaved beggar-ticks or linear-leaf beggar-ticks, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens linearifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as eczema and acne. Bidens linearifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
